'''Jiaan'''<ref name="Idol Intentions" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Jiaan system/Legends|Jiaan system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Almak sector/Legends|Almak sector]].<ref name="TEAOC" /> During the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]<ref name="Idol Intentions" />—which was [[Declaration of a New Order|established]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Declaration of a New Order]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref>—Jiaan was one of many planets that was subjugated and decimated by the [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], targeted after [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tyneir Renz]]—a [[Human/Legends|Human]] native of the planet—escaped the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. Renz's [[Tyneir Renz's wife|wife]] and [[Tyneir Renz's son|son]] were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the razing of Jiaan, though he managed to save his [[Gender/Legends|daughter]], [[Padija Anjeri]].<ref name="Idol Intentions" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jiaan was first mentioned in Tyneir Renz's character statistics block included with "[[Idol Intentions]]," a short story by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] in the [[February]] [[1997]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 12|twelfth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Idol Intentions" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Jiaan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Jiaan, in grid square J-17.<ref name="TEA" />
